rationale: Connection-holding efficiency improvement; no specific spec rule violated, pure performance concern.
Improving error message text for connection failures; UX improvement, no spec rule involved.
Improvement type, adding storage options per DRIVERS-194 coordination; proactive feature addition, not a bug.
Improvement type, adding collection storage options per DRIVERS-195 coordination; feature addition, not a bug.
OS X-specific buffering failure under 300 threads; platform implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Dropped connection silently returns empty cursor; error propagation bug but no specific spec rule names this case.
Internal constant misspelling (OPLOG_REPLY vs OPLOG_REPLAY); acknowledged as internal flag only, no wire behavior change.
Adding a 'How to Ask for Help' section to the GitHub readme; pure documentation change.
Adding make check as separate build step; CI/build infrastructure change only.
BCON_NEW builder bug with $and/$or when preceded by other expressions; client library API bug, not a spec deviation.
mongoc_cursor_clone() drops field projections; cursor clone API bug, no cursor spec rule defines clone behavior.
Auth spec requires using provided username for X509; driver ignores it and always extracts from cert subject.
Removing unprefixed MAX/MIN/ABS macros to avoid collisions; internal C preprocessor namespace cleanup.
UNIX domain socket connection fails and wrong socket path documented; implementation + docs bug, no spec rule.
test_index_storage assertion fails against newer mongod; CI/test failure, not a spec compliance issue.
Driver never reports WriteConcernError from 2.6+ write commands; write concern spec requires reporting these errors.
Post-release version bump breaks --with-libbson=system build option; packaging/build issue only.
Connection error specific to 2.8 + WiredTiger engine combination; environment-specific implementation bug.
Generic socket read error message is unhelpful; requesting better error messaging, no spec behavior involved.
VS 2008 compilation and link errors; build toolchain compatibility fix, no spec behavior.
mongoc_client_new() returns non-NULL when server unreachable; API behavior bug, no spec rule defines client creation return value.
Ticket explicitly cites 'SDAM spec mandates hostnames be normalized to lower case'; URI parsing violates this rule.
IPv6 literal addresses required by connection string spec; driver fails to parse them from ismaster host list.
Multiple BIO_write calls per vectorized write is inefficient for TLS; pure performance optimization, no spec rule.
Cursor not freed in mongoc_client_get_database_names; memory leak, implementation bug, no spec rule.
SCRAM authentication error message is cryptic; requesting better UX error text, not a spec behavior issue.
MinGW-w64 shared library build fails due to missing -no-undefined flag; build toolchain issue only.
Driver uses original URI seed count instead of expanding/contracting topology from isMaster hosts; violates SDAM topology update rules.
connectTimeoutMS ignored when mixed-case; connection string spec requires case-insensitive option name parsing.
SDAM/server-selection spec tests output non-standard format and can't be individually run; test runner integration fix.
Write concern inheritance removed from mongoc_collection_update and never added to bulk; spec requires inheritance from client/collection.
OpenSSL thread-id callback cleanup causes segfault when shared with other libs; implementation/threading bug, no spec rule.
Bulk operation without explicit write concern should inherit from client; spec defines write concern inheritance chain.
Refactor to avoid passing server description objects deep into cluster code to prevent future race conditions; internal architecture.
Internal refactor removing unnecessary write_concern parameter from select-related cluster methods; no behavior change.
Python man-page generator should use stdlib instead of lxml for portability; build tooling improvement only.
Refactor write command code to query cluster for wire version rather than using server description objects; internal architecture fix.
Out-of-range port numbers silently wrap via sscanf instead of returning parse error; connection string spec requires validation.
Parsing w=1 as W_DEFAULT means driver may send empty write concern, applying unexpected server-side defaults; spec requires w=1 to be explicit.
Deprecating cluster-wide max message/BSON size API in favor of per-server values; API refactor aligned with SDAM model, no spec rule violated.
SDAM topology code doesn't normalize hostnames to lowercase; companion to CDRIVER-536, same SDAM spec rule.
Valgrind reports indirect memory loss in SDAM server description copy path; memory management bug, no spec rule.
Driver uses try_sendv and doesn't reconnect after primary step down; SDAM spec requires reconnection after topology change.
v1.2 refactor dropped stream initiator callback, breaking drivers built on top of mongoc; API regression, not a spec violation.
Bulk write commands lose server hint and re-select server; could route to wrong server causing data loss; violates server selection rules.
SSL connections broken as regression from CDRIVER-577 refactor; implementation regression, not a spec deviation.
GitHub release page has a broken download link for 1.1.5 tarball; documentation/release infrastructure issue.
Missing #include of private header in corresponding .c file causes compiler warning; C build hygiene fix.
Man page synopsis shows wrong function name; documentation error only.
GitHub project page references non-existent version 1.1.1; documentation version error only.
